{'id': 'behavior_1', 'name': 'ScheduledBroadcastCreation', 'description': 'ISmsGroupScheduleService.CreateScheduledBroadcastsAsync: batch job that creates SmsGroup broadcasts from active schedules. Supports schedule exceptions (GetScheduleException, CreateScheduleException, UpdateScheduleException, DeleteScheduleException, DeleteAllScheduleExceptions). ScheduleBroadcastsFromFileAsync: create from file by strategy name.', 'trigger': 'Scheduled batch job (recurring)', 'source_file': 'ServiceAlert.Services/SmsGroupSchedules/ISmsGroupScheduleService.cs'}

{'id': 'behavior_2', 'name': 'SmsGroupApprovalWorkflow', 'description': 'NotifyApproversByEmail + NotifyApproversByPhone: sends approval request to profile approvers when broadcast requires approval. GetUnApprovedRequests / GetUnApprovedRequestDtos: returns pending approval items for a profile. ApprovalRequest lifecycle: Create → Update (approve/reject) → Delete.', 'trigger': 'Broadcast creation when profile has approvers configured', 'source_file': 'ServiceAlert.Services/SmsGroupApprovers/ISmsGroupApproverService.cs'}

{'id': 'behavior_3', 'name': 'SmsGroupStatisticsComputation', 'description': 'ISmsGroupStatisticService.RunSmsGroupStatisticsAsync(fromDate, whatIf): recalculates SmsGroup statistics from a given date. whatIf=true runs without persisting. Async batch operation.', 'trigger': 'Batch job or admin-triggered recalculation', 'source_file': 'ServiceAlert.Services/SmsGroupStatistics/ISmsGroupStatisticService.cs'}

{'id': 'behavior_4', 'name': 'SmsGroupDeletedCleanup', 'description': 'SmsGroupDeletedHandler handles SmsGroupDeletedNotification (MediatR). {'id': 'behavior_5', 'name': 'SmsGroupLookup', 'description': 'LookupSmsGroupCommandProcessor processes LookupSmsGroupCommand. SmsGroupFoundEventListener handles SmsGroupFoundEvent. Used during code-lookup flow to resolve an SmsGroup from a lookup code.', 'trigger': 'Code lookup wizard resolves an SmsGroup', 'source_file': 'ServiceAlert.Services/Lookup/CodeLookup/CommandProcessors/LookupSmsGroupCommandProcessor.cs'}

{'id': 'behavior_6', 'name': 'SmsGroupStencilManagement', 'description': 'ISmsGroupStencilService manages stencils (templates/presets) for SmsGroups.
